Jain, Secretary NDMA, as Member, National Disaster Management Authority. 2. Shri R.K Jain, will function as Member Secretary NDMA, for a period co-terminus with his tenure as Secretary NDMA or until further orders, whichever is earlier. [F. No. 44-24/2014-NDM-II] G.V.V.
